items.title: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

items.title: BBC sees destroyed villages in Israeli-occupied southern Lebanon
items.summary: Travelling with a humanitarian convoy, BBC's Hugo Bachega has been given rare access to a part of Lebanon under Israeli occupation.

items.title: Lebanese turtle conservationist Mona Khalil killed by Israeli strike
items.summary: Mona Khalil, who had refused to leave the beach she had spent years protecting, died after several days in hospital, an environmental group said.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 搭私人飛機趕場世足賽  FIFA主席挨批不環保
items.summary: 隨著2026世界盃足球賽在北美3國火熱開打，為了能盡量多親臨現場觀戰的國際足球總會（FIFA）主席英凡提諾（Gianni Infantino）也驛馬星動；然此積極、敬業態度卻令...…

items.title: 中國官媒踢爆多款嬰兒紙尿褲含有毒物質 廠商急忙澄清仍引質疑
items.summary: 中國官媒《新華社》主辦的《經濟參考報》，18日踢爆中國「Babycare」、「好奇」、「碧芭寶貝」等多個品牌的嬰幼兒紙尿褲存在有毒物質甲醯胺，廠商見狀連忙送交第三方機構檢驗，並於...…

items.title: 北約出資援烏採購愛國者飛彈  義大利不買單
items.summary: 北約協助烏克蘭取得美製武器的採購機制出現雜音。義大利國防部長克羅塞托（Guido Crosetto）證實，義大利將不參與北約的「優先烏克蘭需求清單（PURL）」計畫，不會出資向...…
